name: Spinach Salad with Moroccan Lemon
recipeInstructions:
- Finely chop
1. Trim off spinach roots and remove bruised and yellowed leaves; discard.
2. Rinse spinach well, drain, and coarsely chop.
3. In a 5-6 quart pan, combine spinach, parsley, cilantro, and celery leaves. Stir over high heat just until greens are wilted, 3-5 minutes.
4. Pour vegetables into a colander set over a bowl. Press spinach mixture to remove liquid; place vegetables in a serving bowl. (If made ahead, cover and chill up to a day.)
5. Return drained spinach liquid to pan; add garlic, paprika, and chili powder. Boil, uncovered, over high heat until reduced to about 1/4 cup, 3-5 minutes.
6. Add olive oil, preserved lemon quarters, and lemon juice. (If made ahead, cover and chill up to a day.)
7. Top greens with tomatoes and pour dressing over the vegetables.
